problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
hypothesis: Combining Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
